description: Don't allow the monsoon to dictate your fashion sense! Wear these stylish sandals from catwalk to brave the elements and look fabulous. This pair goes with denims, skirts and even leggings. UpperSynthetic leather upper with thong style straps with cutoutsSynthetic leather toe separatorErgonomically designed suede footbed with mild padding for instep comfortOutsole stitched onto the upper in the heel region for comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with wedge style heel with herringbone patterns on the forefoot and terraced grooves on the heelSandal careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
